lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function perfectly. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition and shows no signs of wear.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically reliable and has been regularly serviced. The exterior and interior show minor signs of normal wear but no significant damage.

This vehicle is a fantastic find, offering a smooth and reliable ride that you're going to love! It has been well-maintained and is in good overall condition, showing just a few minor signs of its previous adventures. It’s ready for many more miles and represents a wonderful balance of quality and value for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition, offering reliable transportation for anyone looking for a solid daily driver without the high price tag of a newer model. While the engine and transmission are in good working order, there are visible signs of wear consistent with its age. The exterior has several minor scratches and a small patch of fading paint on the hood. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows some staining. It has recently had an oil change and the tires have decent tread left. This is a practical choice for someone prioritizing functionality over aesthetics.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing the pinnacle of automotive preservation. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, maintaining a deep, factory-fresh luster with no stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is in a pristine state, with the leather upholstery and trim showing zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and only original parts. Every feature and electronic component functions flawlessly. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and performance. A prime choice for the discerning professional, this vehicle offers an optimal synthesis of enduring quality and exceptional value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and let me tell you, it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me over the years. Whether you're just commuting to work or planning a weekend getaway, this car is ready for its next adventure. It’s got a lot of life left in it and still looks fantastic on the road. Come take it for a test drive—I’m sure you’re going to love it as much as I have!

This BMW E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power unit, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains rigid with documented subframe reinforcement, and the 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox offers precise engagement. Equipped with a limited-
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

Presenting a meticulously cared-for vehicle that strikes an ideal balance between performance and value. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the typical minor character marks expected from careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the seats are supportive and free of major wear, and all electronic features, from the climate control to the infotainment system, function exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is robust, featuring a responsive powertrain and a suspension system that remains tight and quiet over varied terrain. It has been serviced regularly according to the manufacturer's schedule, including recent fluid updates and a thorough multi-point inspection. With plenty of life left in the tires and brakes, this is a dependable, honest vehicle ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a seamless driving experience, having undergone rigorous inspections to ensure performance standards remain high. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of value and proven reliability.

We are pleased to present this expertly maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the unit demonstrates consistent performance and a well-appointed interior, reflecting a history of diligent care. This offering represents a distinguished choice for the collector or commuter seeking a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value.

Hi there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car and looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been so reliable for all my daily errands and weekend trips. It drives like a dream and is super clean inside and out! If you're looking for a solid, great-looking ride that’s ready to go, this is the one for you. Let’s chat!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering a linear power band through six individual throttle bodies. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable limited-slip differential. This chassis has been proactively maintained, including a VANOS system refresh and reinforcement of the rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity. While displaying minor aesthetic wear consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are robust, featuring a recently calibrated valve train and refreshed suspension bushings for precise turn-in and communicative feedback through the
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a premium driving experience. The exterior retains a beautiful finish with only minor cosmetic marks consistent with gentle use, while the wheels and trim remain sharp and well-cared for. Inside, the cabin is clean and inviting, featuring well-preserved seating and fully functional electronics that ensure a comfortable journey for all passengers. Under the hood, the car performs reliably, benefiting from a consistent service history and a smooth-shifting transmission. It handles with precision and provides a quiet, composed ride. This is a complete package for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure performance standards that meet the expectations of a discerning driver. Offering an exceptional synthesis of value and long-term reliability, it remains a premier selection for those seeking quality without compromise.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, this automobile demonstrates exceptional mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing robust performance with long-term reliability. This is a significant opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that adheres to our rigorous standards of quality and excellence.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in great shape for its next owner! Everything runs smoothly, and it’s super clean inside and out. You’re going to love how it handles on the road—it's ready for many more adventures. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Experience the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering with this E46 M3. Powered by the S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline, this specimen delivers exceptional throttle response and linear power delivery. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory variable M-differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive Vanos system overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity. Riding on a tuned suspension with refreshed bushings, the turn-in remains sharp and communicative. The exterior presents well with minor road-going patina, while the mechanical components are strictly maintained for the driving enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a perfect balance of performance and daily usability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like finish, though closer inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the lower front valance consistent with careful road use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and clean; while the driver’s side bolster shows very light entry wear, the cabin is free of odors and all tech features—including the premium sound system and navigation—function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine pulls strongly, backed by a consistent service history and recent synthetic oil change. The transmission shifts crisply, and the car sits on high-performance tires with plenty of tread remaining. It has been garaged throughout its ownership and driven primarily in fair weather. This is a turn-key vehicle, offering a reliable and spirited driving experience

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for reliability and performance. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional investment for the discerning driver who prioritizes both quality and value.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This model has been curated for the discerning driver, offering a balanced combination of performance and long-term reliability. The interior remains in commendable condition, while the exterior retains its professional profile. Rigorously inspected to ensure compliance with our high standards, this vehicle represents a strategic investment for those prioritizing quality and value in a pre-owned asset.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my awesome car! It’s been such a reliable ride and is in really solid shape, just waiting for its next adventure. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a road trip, this beauty drives like a dream and has plenty of life left in it. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Come check it out!

Available for acquisition is a driver-focused E92 M3, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This unit delivers a linear power band peaking at an 8,250 RPM redline, paired with a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and the factory Variable M Differential Lock for superior corner-exit traction. The chassis maintains its composure via an aluminum multi-link rear suspension and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) with three-stage mapping. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive inspection of the rod bearings and throttle actuators to ensure long-term mechanical reliability. While the Interlagos Blue finish and interior show minor signs of use consistent with a well-loved enthusiast vehicle, the structural integrity and drivetrain performance remain robust. This is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s final high-displacement, atmospheric M-car, ideal for the purist seeking a visceral, analog driving experience.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for, reliable driver that balances performance with everyday comfort. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the lightest signs of road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and inviting; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of significant wear, while the dashboard and trim pieces have been preserved in excellent shape. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the responsive infotainment system, functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, the car is robust and dependable, having benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. It delivers a smooth, composed ride with precise handling and confident braking. This is a smoke-free, garage-kept vehicle that has been treated with genuine pride of ownership, making it a stellar choice for its next driver.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies dependable performance and refined engineering. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this specimen meets our rigorous standards for safety and operational reliability. It offers a harmonious balance of driver comfort and mechanical integrity, representing an exceptional value proposition for the discerning motorist. We invite you to experience its consistent handling and well-preserved appointments firsthand.
